headline: PTC Inc. (NASDAQ:PTC) Passes the "Caviar Cruise" Quality Investing Screen
summary: PTC Inc. exemplifies quality investing with strong growth, exceptional capital returns, and robust cash flow, making it a durable candidate for long-term portfolios.

headline: PTC: How The Company Is Divesting Excess Burdens To Accelerate SaaS Growth
summary: PTC divests IoT to boost SaaS margins as ARR growth hits 9% and buybacks target a re-rating.
